title: PrimeTask | The productivity system that's yours forever
excerpt: Tasks, projects, CRM, calendar, focus, and a visual canvas. One connected system, on your machine. One-time purchase. No subscription.
content_html:
Software you own. Not software you rent.

Tasks, projects, CRM, calendar, focus, and a visual canvas. One connected system, on your machine.

100% Offline·One-time purchase·Local-first data·Yours forever

Project management

Start with a project.

Open a new project and give the work a shape from day one. Goals, milestones, notes, tasks, and health all live together, so the project is more than a folder.

PrimeTask helps you see what matters: what you are trying to achieve, what is already moving, what is slipping, and what needs attention next.

Included in Standard.

Explore project management

Task management

Add tasks the way you actually think.

Type what needs to happen in plain language. PrimeTask can understand dates, projects, priorities, tags, assignees, contacts, companies, statuses, and durations as you write.

No structured form. No modal maze. Just capture the task while the thought is still fresh, then let PrimeTask turn it into something organised.

Included in Standard.

Explore task management

What's inside

Everything you need. Nothing you don't.

Quick Add, List, Board, Calendar, and Gantt views. Capture work fast, then manage it from the view that fits the moment.

Learn more

Goals, milestones, notes, health tracking, and progress context. Give every project a clear shape from day one.

Learn more

Day, Week, Month, Agenda, and Day Planner views. Apple Calendar and Reminders sync keep capture close at hand.

Learn more

Pomodoro and custom timers, pop-out task windows, break tracking, and focus session statistics.

Learn more

A visual canvas on live project data. Mind maps, task nodes, CRM nodes, media embeds, and FlowMode presentations.

Learn more

Trigger-condition-action rules, built-in presets, and custom workflows that run locally without monthly automation caps.

Learn more

Bring Your Own AI via MCP, Obsidian plugin, Apple Calendar & Reminders sync, imports, exports, and deep links.

Learn more Pro

Contacts, companies, deal pipeline, outreach tracking, sales dashboards, and relationship workspaces connected to projects.

Learn more Pro

Field types, rollups, financial summaries, and structured project data for teams that need more than progress bars.

Learn more

PrimeCRM

Pro

Every contact is a workspace.

A contact in PrimeTask is not a row in a database. It is a workspace: projects this person touches, every activity logged, deals in flight, files attached, and tasks tied to the relationship.

Personal contacts and business contacts can live in the same system, while Spaces and project-level CRM modes keep context separated when you need boundaries.

Available on Pro.

Explore PrimeCRM

Custom Fields

Pro

Most project dashboards stop at progress bars.

PrimeTask lets projects carry the numbers that actually matter: budget, burn rate, runway, billing status, risk, owner, priority, and any custom field your work needs.

Rollups turn those fields into live project context, so you are not just tracking whether tasks are done. You can see whether the project is healthy, affordable, and still worth the plan.

Available on Pro.

Explore custom fields

PrimeFlow

Now see everything connected.

Projects, tasks, contacts, and custom fields are not separate stacks in PrimeTask. They live on the same canvas, and every link between them is bidirectional.

PrimeFlow is the visual layer where all of it comes together. Build a deal pipeline, sketch a project plan, map a system, or just lay out today's work. Drop in any task, contact, project, or note. They keep their data, and they update wherever else they appear.

Included in Standard. Advanced nodes and FlowMode are available on Pro.

Explore PrimeFlow

Apple ecosystem

Capture tasks from anywhere.

PrimeTask syncs bidirectionally with Apple Reminders. Add tasks from your iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch, or Siri. They flow straight into your projects.

iPhone & iPad

Add tasks in Reminders on any Apple device. They appear in PrimeTask on your Mac automatically.

Siri

"Hey Siri, remind me to review the proposal." Done. It appears in PrimeTask.

Apple Watch

Raise your wrist, speak, done. Tasks captured in seconds without reaching for your phone.

Works offline

Reminders works without internet on all devices. PrimeTask syncs when both are online.

Bidirectional

Changes flow both ways. Complete a task in PrimeTask and it's done in Reminders too.

One list, one Space

Pick a Reminders list to sync. Synced tasks land in the PrimeTask Space you choose.

Built with native Swift using EventKit. Not a workaround. A first-class integration.
PrimeTask Mobile is in development.

First of its kind

We checked. Nothing else does this.

No product on the market combines tasks, projects, CRM, calendar, canvas, focus, and automations into one offline-first desktop app you own. PrimeTask is the first.

We looked. The category didn't exist before we built it.

Built for

For people who take their work seriously.

Manage multiple clients with CRM context tied to projects. Stop paying for three separate subscriptions.

Run operations, sales, and delivery from one desk. Everything in one place without enterprise complexity.

Project isolation with confidential client separation. Parallel campaigns without data leaking between them.

Keyboard-driven workflows, attention to detail, software that doesn’t get in the way.

Manage projects, clients, deadlines, and assets in one place. Game devs, audio producers, content creators, indie publishers.

Plan your life, not just your work. Day planning, focus sessions, personal projects, trip planning, all in one private space.

More than software

Direct chat with the people building PrimeTask.

Every customer gets a private channel to the dev team. Not a support queue. Not a contact form. A real conversation with the people shipping the product.

Report bugs and watch them get fixed. Vote on features and shape the roadmap. Track what is being worked on, what is shipping next, and what just landed. Manage your license and download builds, all in one place.

Pro customers get Beta Channel Access (early builds before stable release) and priority support.

Privacy by design

Software you use every day should belong to you.

Your data lives on your device. No servers hold it, no telemetry phones home, no account is required to use any feature. Lock the app behind a PIN when you step away. Export to open JSON or CSV anytime. Take your data with you, forever.

Privacy by architecture, not by policy.

Trusted by early adopters

What people are saying.

“

Simple pricing

One purchase. Yours forever.

Standard

$69one-time · 2 devices

A fully functional productivity system. No soft limits, no caps.

  • Unlimited tasks, projects, and spaces
  • Quick Add with natural language (e.g. "Call dentist tomorrow 3pm")
  • List, Board, Calendar, and Day Planner views
  • Bring Your Own AI (MCP server, core task tools)
  • PrimeFlow visual canvas (core nodes & mind maps)
  • Focus Mode (Pomodoro, timers, session tracking)
  • Apple Calendar & Reminders sync (capture from any Apple device)
  • 6 built-in automations
  • Goals & Milestones (OKR-style key results)
  • Project Health tracking (progress, recommendations)
  • PIN lock, AES-256 encryption, backup & restore
  • Import/export, personal sync (iCloud or your own sync folder)
  • External Integrations & Deep Links
  • Customer Portal access
  • Free updates included

190+ features

Everything you need to manage tasks, projects, and goals. No limits, no caps.

Buy Now

Recommended

Pro

$139one-time · 4 devices

Everything in Standard, plus the advanced toolkit.

  • Unlimited Contacts, Companies & Deals
  • PrimeCRM (deal pipeline, sales dashboards, activity tracking)
  • Company Linking (competitor, partner, supplier, subsidiary & more)
  • LinkedIn Outreach, Sequences & Message Templates
  • Call, Email & Meeting Trackers
  • CRM Import & Export (CSV, vCard, JSON)
  • Custom Fields (14 types, cross-entity connections, rollups)
  • Full MCP toolset for your AI (100+ tools, incl. CRM & Custom Fields)
  • Custom Statuses & Custom Priorities
  • Gantt View (dependencies, zoom, drag-resize)
  • Custom Kanban Boards
  • PrimeFlow advanced nodes, Portals & FlowMode and more
  • Custom Automations (unlimited rules)
  • Project Metrics (snapshots, velocity, charts, export)
  • Collaboration & Shared Spaces (team sync, assignments, notifications)
  • CRM & Sales Reports (activity tracking, sales funnel)
  • Beta Channel Access (early builds & new features)
  • Priority support

280+ features

Buy Now

Compare all 280+ features side by side

14-day free trial with full Pro access14-day money-back guaranteeApple Silicon Mac. Windows coming soon.

Ready to own your productivity?

Start with a 14-day free trial. Full Pro access. No credit card required. Install once, own forever.

Start Free Trial

Apple Silicon Mac required·Windows coming soon·14-day money-back guarantee

Your tools should outlive the companies that made them.

Common questions

Frequently asked questions

Newsletter

Stay in the loop

Get product updates, productivity tips, and early access to new features. No spam, unsubscribe anytime.

Your tools should outlive the companies that made them.

sentences.en: They keep their data, and they update wherever else they appear.

sentences.zh: 苹果生态系统

sentences.en: Capture tasks from anywhere.

blocks.html_en: PrimeTask syncs bidirectionally with Apple Reminders. Add tasks from your iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch, or Siri. They flow straight into your projects.

sentences.en: PrimeTask syncs bidirectionally with Apple Reminders.
sentences.zh: PrimeTask 与 Apple Reminders 双向同步。

sentences.en: They appear in PrimeTask on your Mac automatically.

content_html_zh:
您拥有的软件。 不是您租用的软件。

任务、项目、CRM、日历、焦点和视觉画布。 您的机器上有一个连接的系统。

100%离线·一次性购买·本地优先数据·永远属于你

项目管理

从一个项目开始。

打开一个新项目，从第一天开始就给作品定型。 目标、里程碑、笔记、任务和健康状况都在一起，因此项目不仅仅是一个文件夹。

PrimeTask 可以帮助您了解重要的事情：您正在努力实现的目标、已经发生的事情、正在下滑的事情以及下一步需要注意的事情。

包含在标准中。

Explore project management

任务管理

按照您实际的想法添加任务。

用简单的语言输入需要发生的事情。 PrimeTask 可以在您编写时了解日期、项目、优先级、标签、受让人、联系人、公司、状态和持续时间。

没有结构化的形式。 没有模态迷宫。 只需在想法还清晰的时候捕捉任务，然后让 PrimeTask 将其变成有组织的东西。

包含在标准中。

Explore task management

里面有什么

你需要的一切。 没有什么是你不知道的。

快速添加、列表、看板、日历和甘特图视图。 快速捕获工作，然后从适合当前情况的视图进行管理。

Learn more

目标、里程碑、注释、健康跟踪和进度背景。 从第一天起就给每个项目一个清晰的形状。

Learn more

日、周、月、议程和日计划视图。 Apple 日历和提醒同步让捕捉触手可及。

Learn more

番茄钟和自定义计时器、弹出任务窗口、休息跟踪和焦点会话统计数据。

Learn more

实时项目数据的可视化画布。 思维导图、任务节点、CRM 节点、媒体嵌入和 FlowMode 演示。

Learn more

触发条件操作规则、内置预设以及本地运行的自定义工作流程，没有每月自动化上限。

Learn more

通过 MCP、Obsidian 插件、Apple 日历和提醒同步、导入、导出和深层链接带来您自己的 AI。

Learn more Pro

联系人、公司、交易渠道、外展跟踪、销售仪表板以及与项目相关的关系工作区。

Learn more Pro

为需要的不仅仅是进度条的团队提供字段类型、汇总、财务摘要和结构化项目数据。

Learn more

优质客户关系管理

Pro

每个联系人都是一个工作空间。

PrimeTask 中的联系人不是数据库中的一行。 它是一个工作空间：投影此人接触的内容、记录的每项活动、正在进行的交易、附加的文件以及与关系相关的任务。

个人联系人和业务联系人可以位于同一系统中，而空间和项目级 CRM 模式可在您需要边界时保持上下文分离。

在专业版上可用。

Explore PrimeCRM

自定义字段

Pro

大多数项目仪表板都会停在进度条上。

PrimeTask 让项目携带真正重要的数字：预算、烧钱率、跑道、计费状态、风险、所有者、优先级以及您工作所需的任何自定义字段。

汇总将这些字段转变为实时项目上下文，因此您不仅仅是跟踪任务是否完成。 您可以查看该项目是否健康、负担得起并且仍然值得计划。

在专业版上可用。

Explore custom fields

PrimeFlow

现在看到所有连接的东西。

项目、任务、联系人和自定义字段在 PrimeTask 中不是单独的堆栈。 它们生活在同一个画布上，它们之间的每个链接都是双向的。

PrimeFlow 是所有这些都汇集在一起​​的视觉层。 建立交易渠道、草拟项目计划、规划系统，或者只是布置今天的工作。 放入任何任务、联系人、项目或注释。 他们保留数据，并在出现的任何地方进行更新。

包含在标准中。 Pro 版提供高级节点和 FlowMode。

苹果生态系统

从任何地方捕获任务。

PrimeTask 与 Apple Reminders 双向同步。 从 iPhone、iPad、Apple Watch 或 Siri 添加任务。 它们直接流入您的项目。

iPhone 和 iPad

在任何 Apple 设备上的“提醒事项”中添加任务。 它们会自动出现在 Mac 上的 PrimeTask 中。

Siri

“嘿 Siri，提醒我查看提案。” 完毕。 它出现在 PrimeTask 中。

苹果手表

举起手腕，说话，完成。 无需拿起手机即可在几秒钟内捕获任务。

离线工作

提醒事项无需互联网即可在所有设备上使用。 PrimeTask 在两者都在线时同步。

双向

变化是双向的。 在 PrimeTask 中完成任务，也会在提醒中完成。

一个列表，一个空间

选择要同步的提醒列表。 同步任务会落在您选择的 PrimeTask 空间中。

使用 EventKit 使用原生 Swift 构建。 不是解决方法。 一流的集成。PrimeTask Mobile 正在开发中。

对于认真对待工作的人来说。

使用与项目相关的 CRM 上下文来管理多个客户。 停止支付三个单独的订阅费用。

在一张办公桌上运行运营、销售和交付。 一切都集中在一处，没有企业复杂性。

项目隔离与机密客户分离。 并行活动，它们之间不会泄露数据。

在一处管理项目、客户、截止日期和资产。 游戏开发人员、音频制作人、内容创作者、独立发行商。

规划你的生活，而不仅仅是你的工作。 每日计划、焦点会议、个人项目、旅行计划，一切尽在一个私人空间。

不仅仅是软件

与构建 PrimeTask 的人员直接聊天。

每个客户都有一个与开发团队联系的私人频道。 不是支持队列。 不是联系表格。 与运送产品的人员进行真实对话。

报告错误并观察它们得到修复。 对功能进行投票并制定路线图。 跟踪正在处理的内容、接下来要发货的内容以及刚刚落地的内容。 管理您的许可证并下载版本，全部集中在一处。

隐私设计

您每天使用的软件应该属于您。

您的数据存储在您的设备上。 没有服务器保存它，没有遥测电话回家，不需要帐户即可使用任何功能。 当您离开时，用 PIN 码锁定应用程序。 随时导出以打开 JSON 或 CSV。 永远随身携带您的数据。

隐私由架构决定，而不是由政策决定。
